title: Displaying the Time Tracking column in a workload board
excerpt: When I add the Time Tracking column too my Workload board, I do not get a number displayed in hours.  Rather, according to support, I get number the represents seconds and there is no way to write a formula to convert it…

posts.author: dkalsow (Dale Kalsow)
posts.cookedHtml: When I add the Time Tracking column too my Workload board, I do not get a number displayed in hours. Rather, according to support, I get number the represents seconds and there is no way to write a formula to convert it to a number that is usable. It would be great to be able to added the Time Tracking column to a workload board. This should allow managers to look back to see how much time is able to be applied to project work.
